results.content:
import math
from PIL import Image
points=[]
cx=cy=cz=None
min_x=min_y=min_z=float('inf')
max_x=max_y=max_z=float('-inf')
with open('/app/text.gcode') as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.startswith(('G0 ','G1 ')):
            parts=line.split(';')[0].split()
            x,y,z,e=cx,cy,cz,None
            for p in parts:
                if p.startswith('X'): x=float(p[1:])
                elif p.startswith('Y'): y=float(p[1:])
                elif p.startswith('Z'): z=float(p[1:])
                elif p.startswith('E'): e=float(p[1:])
            if z is not None:
                cz=z
            if e is not None and e>0 and cx is not None and cy is not None and x is not None and y is not None:
                if cz is not None and cz >= 3.0:
                    points.append(((cx, cy, cz), (x, y, cz)))
                    min_x=min(min_x, x, cx); max_x=max(max_x, x, cx)
                    min_y=min(min_y, y, cy); max_y=max(max_y, y, cy)
                    min_z=min(min_z, cz); max_z=max(max_z, cz)
            if x is not None: cx=x
            if y is not None: cy=y
res=10
width=int((max_x-min_x)*res)+10
height=int((max_y-min_y)*res)+10
grid=[[0.0]*height for _ in range(width)]
for (x1,y1,z1),(x2,y2,z2) in points:
    dist=math.hypot(x2-x1, y2-y1)
    steps=int(dist*res)+1
    for i in range(steps+1):
        t=i/steps if steps>0 else 0
        px=int((x1+(x2-x1)*t-min_x)*res)+5
        py=int((y1+(y2-y1)*t-min_y)*res)+5
        if 0 <= px < width and 0 <= py < height:
            if z1 > grid[px][py]:
                grid[px][py]=z1
zrange=max_z-min_z if max_z!=min_z else 1
img=Image.new('L',(width,height),0)
p=img.load()
for px in range(width):
    for py in range(height):
        v=int((grid[px][py]-min_z)/zrange*255) if grid[px][py] else 0
        p[px,height-1-py]=v
out='/tmp/heightmap.png'
img.save(out)
print(out, img.size, (min_x,max_x,min_y,max_y,min_z,max_z), len(points))

with open('/app/text.gcode') as f:
    for i,line in enumerate(f,1):
        if line.startswith('M486 S0'): inside=True
        elif line.startswith('M486 S-1'): inside=False
        elif line.startswith(('G0 ','G1 ')):
            parts=line.split(';')[0].split()
            z=None; e=None
            for p in parts:
                if p.startswith('Z'): z=float(p[1:])
                elif p.startswith('E'): e=float(p[1:])
            if z is not None: cz=z
            if inside and e is not None and e>0:
                count+=1
                if cz is not None and (not layers or layers[-1]!=cz):
                    layers.append(cz)
print('segments',count)
print('first_layers',layers[:20])
print('last_layers',layers[-20:])

results.content:
import math, struct, zlib

src='/app/text.gcode'
out='/tmp/text_aligned.png'
inside=False
cx=cy=cz=None
pts=[]
weights=[]
for line in open(src):
    if line.startswith('M486 S0'):
        inside=True
        continue
    if line.startswith('M486 S-1'):
        inside=False
        continue
    if not line.startswith(('G0 ','G1 ')):
        continue
    parts=line.split(';')[0].split()
    x,y,z,e=cx,cy,cz,None
    for p in parts:
        if p.startswith('X'): x=float(p[1:])
        elif p.startswith('Y'): y=float(p[1:])
        elif p.startswith('Z'): z=float(p[1:])
        elif p.startswith('E'): e=float(p[1:])
    if z is not None: cz=z
    if inside and e is not None and e>0 and cx is not None and cy is not None and x is not None and y is not None and cz is not None and cz>=3.0:
        mx=(cx+x)/2; my=(cy+y)/2
        pts.append((mx,my,cz,cx,cy,x,y))
        weights.append(max(1e-6, math.hypot(x-cx,y-cy)))
    if x is not None: cx=x
    if y is not None: cy=y

# weighted PCA on segment midpoints
ws=sum(weights)
mx=sum(p[0]*w for p,w in zip(pts,weights))/ws
my=sum(p[1]*w for p,w in zip(pts,weights))/ws
sxx=sum(w*(p[0]-mx)**2 for p,w in zip(pts,weights))/ws
syy=sum(w*(p[1]-my)**2 for p,w in zip(pts,weights))/ws
sxy=sum(w*(p[0]-mx)*(p[1]-my) for p,w in zip(pts,weights))/ws
ang=0.5*math.atan2(2*sxy, sxx-syy)
# rotate by -ang so principal axis horizontal
ca=math.cos(-ang); sa=math.sin(-ang)
segs=[]
minx=miny=minz=float('inf')
maxx=maxy=maxz=float('-inf')
for _,_,cz,x1,y1,x2,y2 in pts:
    rx1=(x1-mx)*ca-(y1-my)*sa
    ry1=(x1-mx)*sa+(y1-my)*ca
    rx2=(x2-mx)*ca-(y2-my)*sa
    ry2=(x2-mx)*sa+(y2-my)*ca
    segs.append((rx1,ry1,cz,rx2,ry2))
    minx=min(minx,rx1,rx2); maxx=max(maxx,rx1,rx2)
    miny=min(miny,ry1,ry2); maxy=max(maxy,ry1,ry2)
    minz=min(minz,cz); maxz=max(maxz,cz)

res=25
pad=20
width=int((maxx-minx)*res)+2*pad+1
height=int((maxy-miny)*res)+2*pad+1
grid=[[0.0]*width for _ in range(height)]
for x1,y1,z,x2,y2 in segs:
    dist=math.hypot(x2-x1,y2-y1)
    steps=max(1,int(dist*res*2))
    for i in range(steps+1):
        t=i/steps
        x=x1+(x2-x1)*t
        y=y1+(y2-y1)*t
        px=int(round((x-minx)*res))+pad
        py=int(round((y-miny)*res))+pad
        if 0<=px<width and 0<=py<height and z>grid[py][px]:
            grid[py][px]=z
for _ in range(2):
    new=[row[:] for row in grid]
    for y in range(height):
        for x in range(width):
            v=grid[y][x]
            if not v: continue
            for dy in (-1,0,1):
                ny=y+dy
                if 0<=ny<height:
                    for dx in (-1,0,1):
                        nx=x+dx
                        if 0<=nx<width and v>new[ny][nx]:
                            new[ny][nx]=v
    grid=new
zrange=maxz-minz if maxz>minz else 1.0
raw=bytearray()
for y in range(height-1,-1,-1):
    raw.append(0)
    for x in range(width):
        v=grid[y][x]
        raw.append(0 if v==0 else int((v-minz)/zrange*255))

def chunk(tag,data):
    return struct.pack('!I',len(data))+tag+data+struct.pack('!I',zlib.crc32(tag+data)&0xffffffff)
png=b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n'
png+=chunk(b'IHDR',struct.pack('!IIBBBBB',width,height,8,0,0,0,0))
png+=chunk(b'IDAT',zlib.compress(bytes(raw),9))
png+=chunk(b'IEND',b'')
open(out,'wb').write(png)
print({'out':out,'angle_deg':ang*180/math.pi,'size':(width,height)})
PY
{'out': '/tmp/text_aligned.png', 'angle_deg': 22.36825223857978, 'size': (4030, 356)}
